rationale: Keep this pair because the cited paper appears to be a core antecedent in the same empirical domain: both study the 2003–2005 Dutch supermarket price war, and the cited work provides the prior rigorous evidence on consumer/store outcomes and winners/losers. The citing paper explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior price-war research by adding media coverage and multi-stakeholder dynamics, which makes the 2008 study a plausible foundational/comparison reference rather than an incidental mention.
